title: Feedback States — loading skeletons + empty/error states
description: The "no real content to show yet" placeholder family, in two co-located variants. loading: one configurable LoadingSkeleton with per-kind presets (text, card, list, table, form, page, block) over the shadcn Skeleton, plus a spinner-based LoadingState (inline / block / overlay) for in-flight work. empty: one EmptyState with 404/500/403/no-results/empty-list/first-use presets over the shadcn Empty, plus an ErrorPage full-page wrapper. Install one surface with `npx rr add feedback-states loading|empty`, or all with `npx rr add feedback-states` and import the component you need — the SSOT that replaces ad-hoc animate-pulse divs, hand-rolled Loader2 spans, and one-off 404 pages.
